title: Player Tracking
description: Player Tracking is a mod currently in early development, designed to keep track of online time across multiple servers. As development progresses, additional statistics may be added based on user suggestions.
body:
Player Tracking

Halfpace Studio

For support or suggestions, join our Discord server!


Whats new?!

Custom Display Format


Player Online Time is a mod in early development, designed to track online time across multiple servers. As development progresses, additional statistics may be added based on user feedback.

Features

  • Customizable online time overlay displayed while playing on a server

  • Displays time played: session/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly/total

Options

  • Use "=" to open mod options

  • Toggle on or off specific items on the display option to stop time when AFK

  • RGB text and background colouring

  • Transform options (positioning and sizing)

Screenshots
